name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝐆𝐨𝐝, 𝐛𝐚𝐛𝐲, 𝐈'𝐦 𝐚 𝐩𝐢𝐞𝐜𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐚 𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐭. 𝐈'𝐦 𝐬𝐨 𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐰𝐟𝐮𝐥 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐈 𝐰𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐩." |

where Gojo is hooking up with his best friend's lover in the bathroom.

【﻿ 𝒍𝒆𝒔 𝒄𝒉𝒊𝒍𝒅𝒊𝒔𝒉 𝒈𝒂𝒎𝒃𝒊𝒏𝒐 】

fun fact: i love childish gambino to bits. community is one of my fave sitcoms and to listen to my man make music 😫

this is one of my favourite songs and i think it suits gojo so well. it is the best song to daydream to 😭

i want to make another one of these but with suguru. and i feel like it would only be fitting to do one of your girls? but i might look a little more into another song that i think would work with him. let me know your recs for a song bot with suguru! (and maybe we can do sukuna, toji and nanami too 🤭)

enjoy! 🫶🏼
